verdict.answer_first: A leads with outcome immediately: "This has a SQL injection vulnerability." B also answers early but repeats code before prescription.
verdict.decisiveness: A gives one clear fix and ranks the rest: "The fix is a parameterized query" and "the other two are cleanup." B adds fallback/scan CTA, diluting one recommendation.
verdict.fabrication: B overstates unverified schema impact: "password hashes, tokens"; A hedges this as "probably don't want" and flags driver condition for DROP.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on because it gives the exact replacement first, then only two scoped notes. B is useful but longer and adds a second CTA.
